tasks.title: Make CREDENTIALS_PATH call-time in src/services/credential-store.ts
tasks.notes: Replaced const CREDENTIALS_PATH with getCredentialsPath() function. Reads process.env.APRA_FLEET_DATA_DIR at call time. All credential-store tests pass (29 passed).

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 1 — Credential store path hardening
tasks.notes: npm test passes (credential-store tests: 29 passed). Manual verification: APRA_FLEET_DATA_DIR=<dir> correctly redirects vault path to <dir>/credentials.json. Build passes (npm run build).

tasks.title: Create src/cli/secret.ts (OOB delivery path — --set)
tasks.notes: Implemented --set <name> with optional --persist flag. Uses secureInput() for secure entry. Connects to auth socket and sends credentials. Handles OOB delivery, OOB+persist, and persist-only flows.

tasks.title: Create src/cli/secret.ts (Vault management — --list, --update, --delete)
tasks.notes: Implemented --list (table format), --update (metadata via credentialUpdate), --delete (single/all with confirmation). Name validation: [a-zA-Z0-9_]{1,64}.

tasks.title: Wire secret into src/index.ts and update --help
tasks.notes: Added 'secret' command dispatch, updated --help with secret command lines. Kept 'auth' as undocumented alias for backward compatibility.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 2 — New secret CLI entry point
tasks.notes: npm run build passes. apra-fleet secret --help shows correct synopsis. apra-fleet --help shows secret command lines (--set, --list, --delete), auth line not shown (backward-compatible alias). Credential-store tests: 29 passed.

tasks.title: Three-signal OOB in src/tools/credential-store-set.ts
tasks.notes: Implemented three-signal OOB flow: (1) spawn terminal with `apra-fleet secret --set <name>` and record PID, (2) return waiting message to console and log at info level, (3) kill terminal PID on credential receipt. Uses immediate return flow where subsequent calls retrieve stored credential.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Phase 3 — OOB signal upgrade
tasks.notes: Task T4 complete. Build passes. Pre-existing socket cleanup failures in auth-socket.test.ts (EADDRINUSE on named pipes between tests, 21 failures, 1084 passed total). Requires investigation/fix before checkpoint can pass.

tasks.title: Unit tests for credential-store path derivation
